message:
fix(palette): fix edit-before-send key handling and draft persistence bugs

- BUG 1: Only quit on Ctrl+C in edit phase, not on 'q' keypress
- BUG 2: Guard help overlay toggle so '?' types in edit textarea
- BUG 3: Clear editDraft when selecting a new command or going back
- BUG 4: Recalculate textarea height on window resize in edit phase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
